Hub Home > personal-productivity > Inbox Zero & Email Triage System

Inbox Zero & Email Triage System

Design a personalized email management system — triage rules, folder structure, template responses, and time-boxing strategy. Also processes a batch of current emails to demonstrate the system in action and clear your backlog.

Beginner PASTE & GO Time-saving
Pro tip

Paste your last 20 email subject lines and senders. The AI will spot your actual patterns and build rules around them — not generic productivity advice.

email inbox zero triage productivity time management email management

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a productivity systems designer. Build me an email management system and help me process my backlog.

<current_state>
Emails in inbox: [approximate number]
Time spent on email daily:...
You are a productivity systems designer. Build me an email management system and help me process my backlog.

<current_state>
Emails in inbox: [approximate number]
Time spent on email daily:...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a productivity systems designer. Build me an email management system and help me process my backlog.

<current_state>
Emails in inbox: [approximate number]
Time spent on email daily: [hours]
Biggest email pain: [e.g., "too many to read", "can't find things", "respond to everything late"]
Email client: [Gmail / Outlook / Apple Mail / other]
Role: [YOUR ROLE — affects what emails matter]
</current_state>

<sample_inbox>
[PASTE YOUR LAST 20 EMAIL SUBJECT LINES WITH SENDERS — e.g.:
1. From: Stripe — "Your March payout is ready"
2. From: Sarah (client) — "Quick question about the timeline"
3. From: LinkedIn — "You appeared in 12 searches"
...]
</sample_inbox>

Build my system:

1. **Triage rules** — based on my actual email patterns, create 5-7 rules:
   - Category (action required / FYI / delegate / archive / unsubscribe)
   - How to identify (sender, subject keywords, patterns)
   - Target response time

2. **Folder/label structure** — minimal, practical folder setup for my email client.

3. **Time-boxing schedule** — when to check email and for how long. Based on my role.

4. **Template responses** — 3-5 canned replies for my most common response patterns.

5. **Process the sample** — categorize each of my 20 emails using the triage rules. Show me what to do with each one right now.

6. **Automation suggestions** — filters or rules I can set up to auto-sort recurring patterns.
Notes: Claude builds systems grounded in your actual patterns, not generic productivity advice. The sample inbox is key — without real emails, you get template answers. With them, you get a system designed for YOUR email life.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a productivity systems designer. Build an email management system from my actual inbox.

Inbox:...
Act as a productivity systems designer. Build an email management system from my actual inbox.

Inbox:...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a productivity systems designer. Build an email management system from my actual inbox.

Inbox: [NUMBER] emails
Daily email time: [HOURS]
Biggest pain: [PROBLEM]
Client: [Gmail / Outlook / Apple Mail]
Role: [YOUR ROLE]

My last 20 emails:
[PASTE SUBJECT LINES WITH SENDERS]

Build:
1. Triage rules (5-7) — category, identification pattern, response time
2. Folder/label structure
3. Time-boxing schedule
4. 3-5 template responses for common patterns
5. Process my 20 emails — categorize each one now
6. Automation/filter suggestions
Notes: For Gmail users, ask ChatGPT to write the exact Gmail filter syntax for each automation rule. For Outlook, ask for Power Automate flow specifications.

Build an email management system for me.

**Daily time:**...

**Daily time:**...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Build an email management system for me.

**Inbox:** [NUMBER] emails
**Daily time:** [HOURS]
**Pain:** [PROBLEM]
**Client:** [Gmail / Outlook]
**Role:** [YOUR ROLE]

**Last 20 emails:** [PASTE SUBJECT+SENDER]

Create:
1. Triage rules from my patterns
2. Folder/label structure
3. Time-boxing schedule
4. Template responses
5. Process my 20 emails now
6. Automation suggestions

If I use Gmail, suggest specific Gmail filters and labels.
Notes: Gemini in Google Workspace can access your actual Gmail if connected. Ask it to analyze your full inbox patterns and create filters directly — no manual pasting needed.

Build me an email management system.

Inbox: [NUMBER] emails
Daily time: [HOURS]
Pain: [PROBLEM]
Client: [Gmail / Outlook]
Role: [ROLE]

Last 20 emails: [PASTE SUBJECT+SENDER]

Create:
1. Triage rules
2. Folder structure
3. Time-boxing schedule
4. Template responses
5. Process my 20 emails
6. Automation suggestions
Notes: Copilot in Outlook can apply the system directly — create folders, set up rules, and draft Quick Parts for template responses. Ask it to build Outlook rules for each triage category.
